title: Cooling Capacity Test Conditions
summary: Cooling capacity measured at chilled water inlet/outlet 12°C/7°C, outdoor 35°C DB/24°C WB.
evidence_quote: 制冷量测定条件：冷水进/出水温度：12℃/7℃； 室外干/湿球温度：35℃/24℃

title: Heating Capacity Test Conditions
summary: Heating capacity measured at hot water inlet/outlet 40°C/45°C, outdoor 7°C DB/6°C WB.
evidence_quote: 制热量测定条件：温水进/出水温度：40℃/45℃；室外干/湿球温度：7℃/6℃

title: Fault Code E0: Water Flow Detection Fault (Third Time)
summary: E0 indicates water flow detection fault on the third occurrence, requires power reset.
evidence_quote: E0 水流检测故障（第三次） （主机）

title: Fault Code E1: Power Phase Sequence Fault
summary: E1 indicates power phase sequence fault.
evidence_quote: E1 电源相序故障

title: Fault Code E2: Communication Fault
summary: E2 indicates communication fault.
evidence_quote: E2 通讯故障

title: Fault Code E3: Total Outlet Water Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: E3 indicates total outlet water temperature sensor fault, only valid for master unit.
evidence_quote: E3 总出水温度传感器故障（仅主机有效）

title: Fault Code E4: Plate Heat Exchanger Outlet Water Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: E4 indicates plate heat exchanger outlet water temperature sensor fault.

summary: E5 indicates condenser A tube temperature sensor fault.

summary: E7 indicates outdoor ambient temperature sensor fault.
